title: Tesla Powerwall vs Enphase
description: Two popular battery ecosystems with different strengths in capacity, modularity, and installer networks.
winnerSummary: Powerwall often appeals to whole-home backup buyers, while Enphase can be attractive for modular solar-plus-storage systems.
bestForA: Homes wanting larger battery capacity in fewer units.
bestForB: Homes wanting modular expansion and Enphase ecosystem compatibility.
costConsiderations: Compare installed cost, backup loads, warranty, monitoring, and inverter compatibility.

faqs.question: Which battery is cheaper?
faqs.answer: Installed cost depends on design, labor, incentives, and backup scope. Compare full quotes.

faqs.question: Can battery brands be mixed later?
faqs.answer: Battery expansion is usually easiest within the same ecosystem. Mixing brands can require additional equipment or may not be supported by the installer.

faqs.question: What matters more than brand?
faqs.answer: Backup circuit design, usable capacity, inverter compatibility, installer experience, warranty support, and monitoring quality can matter as much as the battery brand.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar financing resources
